comments.author: SnooOnions6539
comments.body: It's a good start, but you need some risk management in there. Your losses are way way bigger than your winners.

replies.author: Smart_Psychology_592
replies.body: Yes, It’s part of the strategy. Making it fair will make the wr lower but still profitable

comments.author: algoholic20
comments.body: What's your average RR to get 90% wr???

replies.author: Smart_Psychology_592
replies.body: This one It’s with a negative rr. With 1 to 1 rr I get a bit more than 60% wr while with a 1 to 2 rr I get 40 to 50% wr

replies.author: algoholic20
replies.body: That's why you have very high win rate. Since wr is inversely proportional to rr. Like the test you showed. Avg Profit 13$ avg loss 90$

comments.author: SnooOnions6539
comments.body: Well give us some context. You just posted a picture and no words.

replies.author: Smart_Psychology_592
replies.body: Momentum scalp strategy . See below for wr and rr

comments.author: d_e_g_m
comments.body: Will you describe your strategy? What are you entries / exits exactly? Why such a big DD and why it will destroy your strategy if you manage that risk?

replies.author: Smart_Psychology_592
replies.body: Well I can’t give you the exact strategy but I can tell you that it’s a breakout strategy of an exact time of the day. Dd it’s based on the risk

replies.author: d_e_g_m
replies.body: Oh? Are you afraid we are gonna steal your once in a lifetime strategy? Fair enough. That DD is too wild for me. Hope you can implement this successfully!
